board.title: COMBAT-FIX
board.note: Root cause: world.js placeMob() pushed a disconnected userData.mob CLONE (plain object literal) to clickTargets instead of a reference to the persistent MOB_NODES entry. Every click handed combat.js a throwaway object with no real hp/dead state and no link to the visible mesh (_inst), so kills never stuck and the rat never died/respawned visually. Fixed entirely in combat.js: added resolveCanonicalMob() which looks up window.EMMOB.nodes by id+position and re-targets attack() at the real persistent node; added mobVisual() helper and fixed mobAnchor()/killMob() to recognize node._inst (previously only checked .group/.mesh, which placeMob() nodes never have). player.js needed no change - arrive() already correctly called EMCOMBAT.attack(t) for kind:'mob'. node --check passes both files.

board.title: PRAYER-FIX
board.note: Active-state now unmistakable (bright lime border+glow halo+checkmark badge+ON label vs neutral dark inactive). Overhead icon sprite (canvas-texture, same tech as npc.js nameplate) follows window.EMPLAYERPOS via local rAF loop, shown for overhead/protect group prayers, only one at a time, removed on toggle-off. node --check passes.

board.title: CREATOR-LAYOUT
board.note: Reformatted to OSRS two-column layout: header, centered 3D preview hero with name field, Design column (left: Head/Torso/Arms/Hands/Legs/Feet/Body type cyclers) + Colour column (right: swatches + Pronouns), single centered Confirm button. Panel widened to 900px, desktop fits without scroll via media query fallback to single-column scroll under 720px width or 680px height. node --check passed.
